entries.title: PAC v1.0.49
changes: Downloads panel is passive: removed Download selected and Refresh controls.
Downloads now filter by binary source folder category and list available files grouped by detected version.
Kept Source Library build actions separate from Downloads.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.50
changes: Fix local endpoint registration crash by adding the missing _safe_runner_slug helper.
Downloads panel now refreshes automatically when traversing Source Library folders.
Downloads category follows sources/binaries/<folder> when browsing binary source folders.
Binary artifact API now returns known binary source folders even before artifacts exist, so the UI can show an empty category instead of stale data.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.51
changes: Added an Install Pi harness action for endpoints when localhost/pi-agent-harness is missing.
Local endpoint harness install runs scripts/build-pi-container.sh and records stdout/stderr, exit code, image and re-check status in Events.
Remote endpoint harness install queues a host command so the endpoint can build the image locally.
Sessions page panels now contain long paths, commands and event output instead of widening the page.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.52
changes: Endpoint capability chips now show available features in green, required missing features in red, and optional missing features in orange.
Local Pi harness install now runs as a tracked background operation and always emits a completed or failed event, including timeout/startup errors.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.53
changes: Made endpoint feature status chips more compact so they read as chips instead of large labels.
Added stronger Pi harness local install pre-flight diagnostics for missing scripts, source folder, and container runtime availability.
Ensured Pi harness install events include a stage and actionable stderr/stdout data when the build fails.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.55
changes: Added independent source/tool versions for binaries, containers and MCP sources.
Binary builds now use the selected source folder VERSION instead of the PAC controller version.
Downloads display the source folder version when artifact names do not contain a version.
Source tree folder rows expose source_version metadata for UI use.
Included endpoint embedded-runner source pack in the bundled source tree.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.56
changes: Added named endpoint tool execution bridge to pac-endpoint.
Added required agent endpoint tool discovery: ripgrep/rg, fd, jq, git, delta, bat/batcat, just.
Endpoint capabilities now report required/missing tools and bridge readiness.
Endpoint command API validates named tool availability before queueing where capability data is available.
Source/config defaults now treat the development tool package as the required endpoint agent tool set.
Fixed endpoint feature chips so configured-but-missing tools remain red instead of falsely green.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.57
changes: Added individual binary delete controls in Downloads.
Added binary artifact prune action to keep only newest version per binary folder.
Removed Source Library download bundle button from the UI.
Downloads now expose binary artifact version metadata and retention-safe cleanup events.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.58
changes: Endpoint binaries can compile in the PAC server URL using PAC_COMPILED_SERVER_URL / PAC_BUILD_SERVER_URL.
Endpoint GPU is no longer shown as a missing feature chip; GPU remains hardware info only.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.59
changes: Added explicit endpoint/controller connection settings so endpoints can connect by IP when mDNS is unavailable.
Binary builds can now override the compiled PAC server URL per build request.
Settings UI includes a controller URL form and mDNS enable toggle.
Build output records the compiled server URL used for purpose-built binaries.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.60
changes: Fixed Windows-style PAC_URL=... command-line assignments for pac-endpoint, pac-agent, and zed MCP helper binaries.
Zed MCP helper now supports PAC_URL environment/config fallback, shorter HTTP timeout, and --check connectivity mode.
Zed MCP helper no longer appears to hang when run directly in a terminal; it prints usage and exits unless launched through stdio by Zed.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.61
changes: Fixed UI version display/update path.
Updated UI fallback version and cache-busted app.js reference.
Updated runtime fallback version constants so stale reads do not show old controller versions.
Patch package explicitly includes VERSION, VERSION_CURRENT.md, web index/app, runner, and API files.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.62
changes: Added online provider presets for OpenAI, OpenAI/Codex, Anthropic, MiniMax, Gemini, Groq, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, Mistral, LM Studio, Ollama, vLLM, and custom compatible providers.
Added provider type support for OpenAI-compatible and Anthropic-compatible model listing/testing paths.
Added Gemini model listing/testing path.
Provider modal can now load sane base URL/API key env defaults from a provider preset.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.63
changes: Added LM Studio native management API actions for load, unload and download.
Added LM Studio inspect and companion script generation from provider rows.
Added companion report endpoint for manually-run LM Studio host hardware reports.
LM Studio chat now uses streaming so active responses do not hit a fixed response timeout.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.64
changes: Replaced the plain preformatted Sessions timeline with structured event cards.
Added pac.timeline.v1 JSON card rendering for agent/tool/Zed timeline events.
Added POST /v1/sessions/{session_id}/events for integrations to append structured events.
Added pac_add_timeline_event to the Zed MCP helper.
Added documentation for the structured session timeline format.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.65
changes: Reworked Sessions timeline into a chat-style conversation view with thought/tool/system bubbles.
Removed JSON-first/cyberpunk session timeline presentation; structured events now render as readable message text with optional details.
Added a bottom session composer with message, command mode, command input, model selection, execution mode, and container image fields.
Added endpoint selection to session creation and marks sessions as endpoint-locked.
Backend now validates endpoint locking and refuses task submissions that try to run on a different endpoint.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.66
changes: v1.0.66 session UX update

entries.title: PAC v1.0.67
changes: Groups consecutive internal thinking/tool activity into one Thinking bubble.
Suppresses noisy agent loop lifecycle entries from the visible chat timeline.
Keeps full internal details available in the Thinking details modal.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.68
changes: Sessions UI cleanup: modal-only thought details, stable user messages, no inline git diff, plus-button session creation.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.69
changes: Persist user messages as durable session events.
Show ChatGPT-style loading/thought line below user messages.
Assistant replies are selectable to inspect model, endpoint and task metadata.
Session live event stream now listens for user_message/task_queued events.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.70
changes: Session composer uses a ChatGPT-like integrated input surface.
Prompt field is empty by default and uses light grey guidance placeholder text.
Compact command/model/execution controls sit inside the composer area for editor parity.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.71
changes: Removed redundant dashboard endpoint and task status cards.
Integrated session composer controls into one editor-style panel with a compact context menu.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.72
changes: Integrated session selector into the Sessions chat header with a compact + create action.
Removed the visible sessions list panel from the Sessions page.
Added slash-command parsing so /rg, /git, /just, etc. are sent as endpoint commands without a separate command field.
Added a container destination modal that appears when container execution is selected.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.73
changes: Made the Sessions composer transparent/dark instead of white.
Tightened Sessions panel sizing to avoid slight overflow.
Show the agent profile in the session header, selector and status hint.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.74
changes: Added a session slash-command lookup table.
/command <tool> and direct /rg, /fd, /jq, /git, /delta, /bat, /bad and /just route to endpoint named-tool execution.
/compact and /subagent are represented as agent/controller skills instead of requiring endpoint binaries.
Added docs for slash command/plugin model.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.75
changes: Session thinking is now a light grey thought line with ChatGPT-like tool activity modal.
Only tool/command activity is shown in thinking details; lifecycle/model chatter is hidden.
Assistant results stay as chat replies, not separate event cards.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.76
changes: Redesigned Source library into a dark editor-like source workspace.
Kept source folders as a browseable tree while showing buildable binaries and containers with inline version pills and a right-side build icon.
Moved feature/platform/source update upload and preview controls into Settings -> Updates so update handling lives in one place.
Kept downloads/prune controls in the source workspace as the compiler output area.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.77
changes: Agent-enabled sessions now route every user turn through the session agent loop.
Slash commands and command input are passed to the agent as intent instead of bypassing the agent.
Session metadata records agent_enabled/execution_mode and reply details show routing context.
Direct model/runner execution remains possible only through explicit direct_model metadata.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.78
changes: Reworked Sources into a real editor-style two-pane workbench.
Removed redundant source category buttons and main Downloads side panel.
Added source tabs, dirty indicators, Save/Save all menu, context menu, create/rename/delete source entries.
Moved downloads into a top-bar modal with artifact delete/prune actions.
Fixed inline build buttons for buildable binary/container source folders.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.79
changes: Moved global Events into a bell-opened drawer instead of a permanent side pane.
Changed the top downloads action to a down-arrow download icon.
Tightened Source Library sizing so only the file tree and editor panes scroll.
Made the Source Library tree expand folders in place like a normal file manager.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.80
changes: Made Sessions and Source Library use the available viewport height without page-level scrolling.
Squared the Sessions surfaces and Source Library editor/tree controls for a less rounded editor feel.
Added a pin button to the Events drawer; clicking outside closes it only when unpinned.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.81
changes: Restored Source Library tree visibility after the full-height square layout changes.
Bumped browser cache key for app.js so the source tree renderer cannot be left on an older cached script.
Added a defensive top-level source fallback if the source API returns top_level without items during early initialization.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.82
changes: Update preview now recognizes PAC app full/patch zip packages as controller updates.
Applying a PAC app package from the Updates panel installs the app update and schedules restart instead of treating it as only source/binary folders.
Source-folder feature packs still preview/apply as additive source updates.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.83
changes: Restored Source Library tree data by normalizing the root cache key returned as "." to the UI root key.
Restored the bottom version footer while preserving full-height Sessions and Source Library layouts.
Updated UI cache/version strings to 1.0.83.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.84
changes: Increased Source Library nested tree indentation so expanded folders and files visually step inward like a normal file manager tree.
Kept the restored tree data, version footer, square/full-height source layout, and existing build/version badges.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.85
changes: Added theme-aware monochrome icon masks for Source Library toolbar and tree entries.
Kept PAC purple as the main brand accent and preserved the Source Library blue editor palette.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.86
changes: Split Providers, Profiles, and Workspaces into their own top-level tabs.
Kept Models focused on model configuration and model overview.
Preserved the existing provider/model/profile/workspace forms and IDs so existing API wiring continues to work.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.87
changes: Added LM Studio runtime controls in the Model view so model entries can save/load context and runtime options directly.
Added backend model-scoped LM Studio load/unload/inspect endpoints.
Repaired LM Studio companion script generation syntax.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.88
changes: Added a root PAC_CHANGELOG.json file so PAC update zips expose version-by-version changes before install.
Update preview now reads the changelog directly from PAC full/patch zips and shows the delta between the installed version and target version.
Removed the redundant Settings page self-update/package panel now that the unified Updates panel handles PAC app updates.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.89
changes: Changed the top-bar bell and download controls to theme-aware black/white SVG icons.
Kept purple as the PAC brand accent while avoiding purple tint on utility icons.
Kept PAC app updates on the restart/reload path and source/tool packs on the no-restart update path.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.93
changes: Added the default main-pi-dev profile for the controller-local pi.dev runtime.
Added the agent-control workspace for the PAC controller application/source tree.
Settings defaults now point the controller pi.dev runtime at main-pi-dev and agent-control.
Added documentation for the main pi.dev profile and agent control workspace.

entries.title: Local endpoint as required controller pi.dev
changes: Merged the controller pi.dev runtime into the existing local-PAC endpoint instead of creating a second local endpoint.
Made the main server pi.dev runtime a required readiness condition for the controller session.
Updated endpoint enablement state to check both the pi.dev image and PAC wrapper prerequisites.
Updated Settings defaults so the controller pi.dev runner points at local-PAC.
Protected the required local-PAC endpoint from deletion.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.97 - GitHub controller/packages release seeding
changes: Configured pac-labs/controller as the main controller repository release source.
Added pac-labs/packages seed workflow and generator for source-package repository mirroring.
Added pac-component.json metadata files for source components so titles, descriptions, maintainers and package data can be indexed.
Source Library API/UI now exposes component metadata in the tree view.
Release workflow now publishes full, patch, changelog, release manifest and package seed artifacts.

entries.title: PAC v1.0.98 - diff pull-request rollout workflow
changes: Added Apply PAC diff PR workflow for label-gated pull requests containing .pac/diffs/*.diff.
Added PAC diff validation script to reject binary patches, path traversal, env/secret files, and self-modification of the privileged apply workflow.
Release generation now emits PAC_UPDATE_DIFF-<version>.diff when Git history is available.
Added documentation for the diff PR handoff flow.

versions.title: Movable data-backed workspaces
changes: Replaced the top download and events icons with cleaner theme-aware monochrome masks.
Expanded Workspaces with placement, runtime/container, data zip, ephemeral and TTL fields.
Workspace save now preserves endpoint/default settings and validates endpoint and TTL input.

versions.title: Controller harness defaults
changes: Added a built-in PAC controller harness runner that represents the controller itself as an always-available local harness.
Added a managed controller harness session that uses the PAC platform source tree as its workspace when a default model/profile is configured.
Added Settings controls for harness defaults, converting the JSON-backed settings into editable form fields instead of requiring raw JSON edits.

versions.title: pi.dev controller runtime terminology
changes: Aligned PAC runtime wording so pi, agent and harness all mean pi.dev.
Reworked controller runtime settings and labels around controller pi.dev.
Added docs/pi-dev-runtime-terminology.md to keep future builds consistent.
Kept PAC-side integration wording focused on PAC wrappers/tooling.

versions.title: Local endpoint as required controller pi.dev
changes: Merged the controller pi.dev runtime into the existing local-PAC endpoint instead of creating a second local endpoint.
Made the main server pi.dev runtime a required readiness condition for the controller session.
Updated endpoint enablement state to check both the pi.dev image and PAC wrapper prerequisites.
Updated Settings defaults so the controller pi.dev runner points at local-PAC.
Protected the required local-PAC endpoint from deletion.
Added controller pi.dev runtime lifecycle supervision.
Starts and monitors the local PAC wrapper process for local-PAC.
Starts and checks a persistent pi.dev controller daemon container.
Binds local wrapper registration into local-PAC instead of creating a duplicate endpoint.
Controller session now requires wrapper process + pi.dev daemon to be running.
pi.dev container entrypoint supports daemon mode with heartbeat/status artifacts.
Added controller pi.dev bootstrap path for local-PAC.
Builds and installs the PAC wrapper binary to ~/.pacp/bin when missing.
Installs/checks the local pi.dev container image when missing.
Main controller session now requires PAC wrapper plus pi.dev image.
Added Settings and Endpoint bootstrap actions plus health display.
Added controller pi.dev bootstrap documentation.
